title: JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets
summary: The bank said Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds avoidable market uncertainty and should be replaced with equity issuance to build cash reserves.

title: U.S. payroll growth slowed sharply in June, with only 57,000 jobs added
summary: This morning's data could slow market expectations for a Fed rate hike as soon as this summer or early Fall.

title: A struggling Nasdaq-listed company that tried to copy Saylor's Bitcoin playbook is completely dumping crypto for AI
summary: The Nasdaq-listed Korean media company once lined up $1 billion in financing to buy 10,000 bitcoin. A recent filing confirms its balance is now zero as it pivots to AI infrastructure and fights to stay listed.

title: Three years after MiCA became law, Europe's crypto framework is undergoing a rethink
summary: Europe’s MiCA regime is now up for review, known colloquially as “MiCA 2.0,” through a consultation that closes around September.

title: Warsh's comments set the stage for U.S. jobs data to ignite bitcoin, gold rally
